feat.name: Speedrun Strats
feat.text:
Nethys Note: This is a part of the April Fool's content from Paizo's blogs.  
  
Whenever you take a move action to Stride, you can attempt a DC 15 Acrobatics check to roll forward.
feat.critical_success: You gain 5 extra feet of movement to your Speeds and can move through solid obstacles such as walls until the end of your Stride action.
feat.success: You gain 5 extra feet of movement to your Speeds until the end of your Stride action.
feat.failure: You lose 5 feet of movement from your Speeds until the end of your Stride action.
feat.critical_failure: Your character softlocks and is paralyzed permanently. Only a *wish* ritual or similar magic can reverse this effect.
